title: Job Opening Category Manager at Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited:
Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited!
